# Pages of Purpose LLC
> We buy houses for cash — any condition, any situation. Fair cash offers in 24 hours, no agent fees, no repairs needed, close on your timeline.

## About
Pages of Purpose LLC is a real estate investment company that purchases residential properties directly from homeowners for cash. We serve sellers facing foreclosure, probate, liens, code violations, tenant issues, and other challenging situations. Our process eliminates the need for real estate agents, inspections, and costly repairs.

## Contact
- Phone: (227) 235-9530
- Email: pagesofpurposellc@gmail.com
- Website: https://pagesofpurposellc.com

## Main Pages
- [Sell Your House Fast](https://pagesofpurposellc.com/sell/): Main landing page — get a cash offer in 24 hours
- [Tired of Being a Landlord?](https://pagesofpurposellc.com/sell/pages/landlords.html): Solutions for burned-out landlords ready to sell rental properties
- [Inherited a Property?](https://pagesofpurposellc.com/sell/pages/probate.html): Sell inherited or probate properties without hassle
- [FSBO Not Working?](https://pagesofpurposellc.com/sell/pages/fsbo.html): Alternative for sellers struggling with For Sale By Owner
- [Distressed Properties](https://pagesofpurposellc.com/sell/pages/distressed.html): Sell fire-damaged, water-damaged, or code-violation properties
- [Title Issues](https://pagesofpurposellc.com/sell/pages/title-issues.html): Sell properties with liens, judgments, or title problems
- [Retail-Ready Homes](https://pagesofpurposellc.com/sell/pages/retail.html): Skip the agent — sell market-ready homes direct for cash

## Guides & Resources
- [How to Stop Foreclosure](https://pagesofpurposellc.com/sell/blog/stop-foreclosure.html): 7 options to stop or avoid foreclosure on your home
- [How to Sell an Inherited House](https://pagesofpurposellc.com/sell/blog/sell-inherited-house.html): Step-by-step guide to selling inherited property
- [How to Sell a House With a Lien](https://pagesofpurposellc.com/sell/blog/sell-house-with-lien.html): Options for selling when liens exist on your property

## Key Facts
- Cash offers provided within 24 hours
- No real estate agent commissions (save 5-6%)
- No repair costs — we buy as-is
- Flexible closing timeline (as fast as 7 days)
- We cover all closing costs
- We handle properties in any condition or situation
